call_name: Innovation Fund call 2025 Net Zero Technologies

topics.name: Clean-tech manufacturing
topics.scope: Manufacturing of batteries and storage solutions; manufacturing of components and materials significant in final equipment performance/cost; innovation in production processes including digital technologies

topics.name: Pilot projects
topics.note: Pre-commercial scale only, 3–5 year lifetime — NOT suitable for 7,000 t/year plant

subcriteria.name: Innovation vs state of the art

award_criteria.threshold: Must pass minimum threshold or proposal rejected

subcriteria.name: Quality of GHG calculation and minimum requirements

minimum_requirements.process_emissions: below applicable EU ETS benchmark at call opening
minimum_requirements.dnsh: compliance with Do No Significant Harm principle required

note_more_criteria: Full award criteria continue in document — scalability/replicability and other subcriteria to be extracted

key_eligibility.geographic: EU Member States or EEA countries — Italy (Brindisi) is eligible
key_eligibility.monitoring_period: At least 5 years after entry into operation
ineligible_activities: Activities primarily aimed at software/services to improve efficient use of ETS Annex I/III products — NOTE: DT alone would be ineligible; must be part of physical manufacturing plant
Activities not complying with DNSH principle
Projects that have already reached financial close

mandatory_annexes: Application Form Part B (PDF, max 70 pages)
Detailed budget table / relevant cost calculator

project_specific_notes.faam_capex: 7,000 t/year LFP plant — CAPEX likely well above EUR 2.5M minimum
project_specific_notes.location: Brindisi, Italy — EU Member State, eligible
project_specific_notes.ghg_case: Electric calcination + renewable grid (southern Italy solar) → basis for >50% GHG reduction vs. gas-fired baseline
project_specific_notes.dt_eligibility_note: DT must be positioned as integrated innovation in the manufacturing process, NOT as a standalone software service
